generation_note: Generated from Bulbapedia individual card page expansion metadata and release-information text. Exact set/number match is required; finish truth is emitted only for explicit finish/stamp/logo wording.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information stamp/logo variant
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped stamp/logo variant. Evidence: A GenCon stamped version was released at GenCon 2004 in August, and another version with no special stamp was released through various promotions during 2004.
